_note: Label vocab + thresholds for scripts/lib/audio_sense.py (concepts/clip-forensics-research-2026-06). CLAP zero-shot scores each window against the `prompt` text and emits `label` when cosine >= the label's optional `threshold` (falls back to clap_threshold). PANNs framewise emits any AudioSet class whose name contains a panns_keep substring (case-insensitive) above panns_threshold. Thresholds are STARTING DEFAULTS to calibrate on your own reference_clips/ — CLAP cosine is uncalibrated and runs LOW (verified: foreground SFX ~0.26-0.32; a BACKGROUND MUSIC BED under speech runs even lower, ~0.20-0.27 on a verified clip, because speech dominates the window). So music/suspense_music carry a LOWER per-label threshold; the sustained-run gate in clip_forensics._music_bed suppresses the false positives that lower floor would otherwise admit. PANNs is opt-in (CLIP_AUDIO_SENSE_PANNS=1) because panns_inference stalls on torch>=2.9.
_sfx_countable_note: BUG 75 (2026-07-15): sfx_countable=false marks labels that must NEVER count toward the 'editor SFX per 30s' metric (attribute_cards). bruh is a VOCAL prompt - CLAP cannot separate 'the bruh meme sound' from ordinary speech, so it fired on EVERY 0.5s window (2,458 of 3,350 reference events = 73%; median score 0.365 vs the 0.30 floor) and single-handedly inflated the reference SFX density to ~30/30s. music/suspense_music/laughter/cheering are content/bed signals, not editor-placed SFX (music runs a LOW threshold on purpose for _music_bed - counting those windows would also inflate). The raised bruh/sad_trombone thresholds only affect FUTURE decomposes; sfx_countable neutralizes the already-cached events post-hoc.

clap_labels.label: boom
clap_labels.prompt: a deep bass boom impact sound effect, vine boom

clap_labels.label: scratch
clap_labels.prompt: a vinyl record scratch sound effect

clap_labels.label: riser
clap_labels.prompt: a rising tension riser build-up sweep

clap_labels.label: boing
clap_labels.prompt: a cartoon boing spring sproing sound

clap_labels.label: sad_trombone
clap_labels.prompt: a sad trombone womp womp wah-wah fail sound

clap_labels.label: beep_censor
clap_labels.prompt: a censorship beep tone bleeping over speech

_panns_keep_note: Substrings matched against the 527 AudioSet class names panns_inference returns (case-insensitive). Kept small and generic so it survives exact-name drift across PANNs versions.
